findings.issue: itv type contradiction persists between tasks. Task 03 defines buildProcPidResult with signature `func buildProcPidResult(..., ticks float64, itv int, cpuCount int) PGresult` — itv is int. Task 05 Details/Files states 'The variable itv is float64 (matching buildProcPidResult's itv float64 parameter from Task 03)' and 'Pass itv directly — no cast needed.' This is factually wrong: the parameter is int in Task 03, not float64. An implementer following Task 05 would either fail to compile (type mismatch) or introduce an incorrect cast.
findings.fix: In Task 05 Details/Files section for stat.go, correct the itv description to: 'The variable itv is int (matching buildProcPidResult's itv int parameter from Task 03). Pass itv directly — no cast needed.' Remove the claim that itv is float64.

findings.issue: Stale constant value not fixed: Dependencies section still says 'Task 04: CollectProcPidStat = 5 constant in internal/stat/stat.go'. The round 1 fix was applied to Task 04 (correct value is 6 there), but Task 05 was not updated. Additionally, the top/stat.go description in Details mentions 'CollectExtra 5→0 or back (0→5)' — same stale value.
findings.fix: Replace all three occurrences of value '5' referring to CollectProcPidStat in Task 05: (1) Dependencies line → 'CollectProcPidStat = 6'; (2) and (3) top/stat.go description 'CollectExtra 5→0' and '0→5' → 'CollectExtra 6→0' and '0→6'.

findings.issue: Mandatory project.md link is absent. Template requires both project.md and architecture.md under Project knowledge as always-required entries. Task 01 has overview.md, architecture.md, and patterns.md — but no project.md entry.
findings.fix: Add a project.md entry to the Project knowledge subsection. If the file exists at .claude/skills/project-knowledge/project.md, use '[project.md](.claude/skills/project-knowledge/project.md) — project context'. If it does not exist at that path, use '[overview.md](.claude/skills/project-knowledge/overview.md)' with clear labeling (do not mislabel it as project.md).

findings.issue: Link name/path mismatch: '[project.md](.claude/skills/project-knowledge/overview.md)' — the link text says 'project.md' but the href points to overview.md. These are different documents. The entry is misleading.
findings.fix: Either rename to '[overview.md](.claude/skills/project-knowledge/overview.md)' to match the actual file, or use the correct path '.claude/skills/project-knowledge/project.md' if project.md exists at that location. Do not combine a project.md name with an overview.md path.

findings.issue: Feature artifact links use broken relative paths without the docs/features/... directory prefix. E.g., '[001-feat-per-process-system-stats.md](001-feat-per-process-system-stats.md)'. Tasks 01, 02, and 04 correctly use full paths like 'docs/features/001-feat-per-process-system-stats/001-feat-per-process-system-stats.md'.
findings.fix: Prefix all three feature artifact link paths with 'docs/features/001-feat-per-process-system-stats/' to match the convention used in other tasks.
